final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing travel infographic for a 4-day 3-night Hangzhou itinerary, designed as a tri-fold brochure with famous landmarks floating on card stock over a real Hangzhou map background.

Style/medium: travel infographic / tri-fold brochure design, editorial layout with illustrated landmark icons, clean typography, flat vector style with subtle depth shadows
Composition: three-panel tri-fold layout, top-down map view as base layer, landmark illustrations floating above with soft drop shadows, clear day-by-day sections with route lines connecting attractions
Subject: Hangzhou 4-day itinerary with illustrated landmarks вҖ” ж–ӯжЎҘж®ӢйӣӘ (Broken Bridge), йӣ·еі°еЎ” (Leifeng Pagoda), зҒөйҡҗеҜә (Lingyin Temple), жі•е–ңеҜә (Fayu Temple), д№қжәӘзғҹж ‘ (Nine Creeks), йҫҷдә•жқ‘ (Longjing Village), жӢұе®ёжЎҘ (Gongchen Bridge), иҘҝжәӘж№ҝең° (Xixi Wetland)
Scene/backdrop: stylized real Hangzhou city map as background base layer, card stock texture visible at edges, clean white/ivory paper surface with subtle grain
Lighting/mood: soft even studio lighting, professional product photography feel, inviting and organized travel guide aesthetic
Color palette: soft jade green and lake blue as primary (иҘҝж№– water tones), warm terracotta accents for landmarks, cream/off-white for paper, black for typography
Text (verbatim): "з¬¬дёҖеӨ©пјҡиҘҝж№–з»Ҹе…ёжёёпјҢжү“еҚЎж•ҷз§‘д№ҰйҮҢзҡ„жұҹеҚ—", "ж–ӯжЎҘж®ӢйӣӘвҶ’зҷҪе ӨвҶ’еӯӨеұұвҶ’жӣІйҷўйЈҺиҚ·вҶ’иӢҸе ӨжҳҘжҷ“вҶ’иҠұжёҜи§ӮйұјвҶ’йӣ·еі°еЎ”вҶ’жҹіжөӘй—»иҺә", "з¬¬дәҢеӨ©пјҡзҰ…ж„Ҹжқӯе·һпјҢз©ҝи¶ҠеҚғе№ҙе®Ӣйҹө", "зҒөйҡҗеҜәвҶ’йЈһжқҘеі°йҖ еғҸвҶ’жі•е–ңеҜәвҶ’е®ӢеҹҺ", "з¬¬дёүеӨ©пјҡд№қжәӘзғҹж ‘еҫ’жӯҘпјҢеҒҡдёҖж—ҘиҢ¶еұұж•Јдәә", "д№қжәӘеҚҒе…«ж¶§вҶ’йҫҷдә•жқ‘вҶ’еҚҒйҮҢзҗ…зҸ°вҶ’дә‘ж –з«№еҫ„", "з¬¬еӣӣеӨ©пјҡж–Үиүәж”¶е®ҳпјҢи§Јй”Ғжқӯе·һABйқў", "жӢұе®ёжЎҘвҶ’жЎҘиҘҝеҺҶеҸІиЎ—еҢәвҶ’е°ҸжІізӣҙиЎ—вҶ’еӨ§е…ңи·ҜйҰҷз§ҜеҜә", "е‘Ёе®¶жқ‘вҶ’ж·ұжҪӯеҸЈвҶ’ж°Ұж°”зҗғдҝҜзһ°ж№ҝең°"
Materials/textures: matte card stock paper texture, subtle embossed effect on landmark icons, clean vector lines for map, slight paper fiber visible
Constraints: all text must be legible at print size; landmark icons must be recognizable silhouettes; map must suggest real Hangzhou geography without being navigation-accurate
Avoid: photorealistic 3D render, cluttered layout, unreadable small text, generic stock travel icons, watermark, 8K stuffer words
